zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Franklen於1546年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德時，他的父親Jenkin Franklen31歲，母親Elen verch Rees Lloyd26歲。他於1567年與Jonet Delamare在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根斯萊德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1640年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根爾享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Franklen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Franklin
meanings: English: status name from Middle English frankeleyn ‘freeman, freeholder, land-owner of free but not noble birth’ (Anglo-Norman French fraunclein). In general, he was a gentleman ranked above the main body of minor freeholders but below a knight or a member of the nobility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, such as   Frankel  .

History: The American statesman and scientist Benjamin Franklin (1706–90) was the son of Josiah Franklin, a chandler (dealer in soap and candles), who had emigrated c. 1682 from Ecton, Northamptonshire, to Boston, MA, where his son was born.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Franklen was born in 1546, in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Jenkin Franklen, was 31 and his mother, Elen verch Rees Lloyd, was 26. He married Jonet Delamare in 1567, in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1640, in Gwyr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Franklen est né en 1546, à Slade, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jenkin Franklen, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elen verch Rees Lloyd, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jonet Delamare en 1567, à Slade, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1640, à Gwyr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Franklenが1546年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンスラドで生まれた時，父Jenkin Franklenは31歳，母Elen verch Rees Lloydは26歳であった。1567年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンスラドでJonet Delamareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガングウイルで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Franklen(이)가 1546년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jenkin Franklen(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen verch Rees Lloyd(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1567년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에서 Jonet Delamare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 그w이르에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Franklen родился в 1546 г. в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jenkin Franklen было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elen verch Rees Lloyd, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet Delamare в 1567 г. в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1640 г. в местности гвир, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет.
